backbone: Variational Graph Auto-Encoder (VGAE) + Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) + Mamba-based recommender
loss: not specified (likely reconstruction loss for VGAE and recommendation loss for Mamba)
key_idea: use VGAE to reconstruct item transition graph for denoising, then GCN to derive robust user/item embeddings, and finally a Mamba-based recommender for efficient sequential prediction
datasets: five public datasets (not named in abstract)
